name: Salsify with Truffle Coulis
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the black truffle.
2. In a sauté pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
3. When the oil is hot, sauté the sliced truffle for 30 seconds.
4. Remove from the heat and puree in a food processor with the truffle oil and water until smooth.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. In another sauté pan, heat the fois gras fat over medium heat.
7. Add the shallots and diced salsify to the pan. Sauté for 2-3 minutes or until the salsify is heated through.
8. Stir in the truffle coulis. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Slice the leftover fois gras into 6 pieces.
10. Spoon the sautéed salsify and truffle coulis onto plates.
11. Place the slices of fois gras directly on top of the salsify.
12. Drizzle truffle oil around the plate.
13. Garnish with chopped chives and black pepper.
Note: Do not use aggressive culinary terms like "destroy," "burn," or "splutter."
